CustomField.description: If true, the input gets normalized. This means strings are trimmed, special quotations replaced with ASCII ones, and special characters replaced with semantically equal ones (e.g. œ -> oe)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If true, the input gets normalized. This means strings are trimmed, special quotations replaced with ASCII ones, and special characters replaced with semantically equal ones (e.g. œ -> oe) Documentation: https://rest.qr-invoice.cloud/swagger-ui/index.html#/11%20Payment%20Part%20%26%20Receipt%20(QR%20Bill)/createPaymentPartReceipt
CustomField.label: Normalize Input
